title: List of South Africans
content: This is a list of notable and famous South Africans who are the subjects of Wikipedia articles. Academics. Theologians. Also see: Prelates, clerics and evangelists Writers. Poets. See also: South African poets and Afrikaans language poets Royalty. Tribal leaders and prophets. See also: Gcaleka rulers, <br <a href="List%20of%20rulers%20of%20the%20Rharhabe" Rharhabe rulers</a <br ,<br <a href="List%20of%20Xhosa%20Chiefs" Xhosa Chiefs</a ,<br Zulus
